meaning: adj.头脑冷静的,清醒的 稳健的
examples: It takes the most levelheaded and good-tempered of drivers to resist the temptation to retaliate when subjected to uncivilized behavior.
A: I am knowledgeable and levelheaded.
Or maybe Jacob is utterly levelheaded, and just bored enough to play an elaborate joke on me.
Take the prefrontal cortex, an area that plays a key role in levelheaded decision making and long-term goals.
